name: Tree
goal: Render a recursive expand/collapse outline for file systems, org charts, taxonomies, JSON inspection, sitemaps, and comment threads.
description: Generic interactive tree with keyboard navigation (ARIA tree pattern) and roving tabindex. Accepts either slot-children (<ce-tree-node> recursively) or a JSON data array. The sibling element <ce-tree-node> provides the per-node rendering with chevron, label slot, and nested children group.
limitations: Animation is not included in v1; expand/collapse is instant. The :host-context CSS for connector lines requires that ce-tree and ce-tree-node share the same shadow boundary chain.

props.name: data
props.description: JSON array of {label, children?:[…]} objects. When non-empty the tree renders virtual nodes in shadow DOM; slot children are ignored.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Startup expansion directive applied once at firstUpdated. Values: all=every node open, root=direct children of tree open, none=all collapsed, depth-1/2/3=nodes at that depth or shallower expanded.

props.name: lines
props.description: Renders vertical connector lines between a parent node and its children.

props.name: dense
props.description: Tighter row height and smaller font size for compact contexts.

events.name: ce-tree-node-toggle
events.description: Fires whenever a node's expanded state changes (click or keyboard). Bubbles from the node through the tree.

methods.name: setAriaPosition (on CeTreeNode)
methods.signature: setAriaPosition(level: number, setsize: number, posinset: number, hasChildren: boolean): void
methods.description: Called by the parent ce-tree to set aria-level, aria-setsize, aria-posinset, and aria-expanded on the node. Not intended for direct consumer use.

slots.description: Nested ce-tree-node elements (slot mode). Ignored when the data attribute is non-empty.

cssVariables.name: --ce-focus-ring
cssVariables.description: Focus-visible ring on the focused node row.

cssVariables.name: --ce-border-soft
cssVariables.description: Connector line color when lines attribute is set.

a11y.notes: Root has role=tree. Each ce-tree-node has role=treeitem, aria-expanded (parent nodes only), aria-level (1-indexed depth), aria-setsize (sibling count), aria-posinset (1-indexed position). Roving tabindex: only the focused node holds tabindex=0; all others hold tabindex=-1. Keyboard: ArrowDown/Up traverse visible nodes, ArrowRight expands or descends, ArrowLeft collapses or ascends to parent, Home/End jump to first/last visible node.

additional.subTagDescription: Recursive tree item. Attributes: label (string), expanded (boolean, reflected), disabled (boolean, reflected). Slots: label (custom label markup), default (nested ce-tree-node children). Emits ce-tree-node-toggle on expand/collapse.
